FuriPhone FLX1s — complete Camera2 HAL capability dump (all published metadata tags)
Generated by: furicam2 with FC2_DUMP_CAPS=1 (CameraSession::dumpAllTags). Format: SECTION+index (hexTag) type[count] = values
Cameras: 0=main back (L3), 1=front (L3), 2=secondary back (LIMITED).
